contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert km/h to mph?
contentBlocks.html:
Kilometers per hour (km/h) is the standard speed unit in most countries. Miles per hour (mph) is used in the US, UK, and a few other countries. 1 km/h = 0.621371 mph, or 1 mph = 1.60934 km/h.

This conversion is essential when driving in the US or UK (speed limits in mph), comparing car specifications, understanding weather reports, and interpreting speed data from international sources.

Common speed limits: 50 km/h = 31 mph (city), 80 km/h = 50 mph (rural), 120 km/h = 75 mph (highway), 130 km/h = 81 mph (autobahn).

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

items.title: 1. Enter a value
items.description: Type a number in the input field. You can use a period or comma as the decimal separator.

items.title: 2. Read the result
items.description: The conversion result appears instantly in the field next to it – no clicking required.

items.title: 3. Copy or reverse
items.description: Click Copy result or use the Reverse button to convert in the opposite direction.

items.title: Jazda w USA/UK
items.description: Ograniczenia prędkości: 25 mph (miasto) = 40 km/h, 65 mph (autostrada) = 105 km/h.

items.title: Prędkościomierz
items.description: Importowane samochody mogą mieć prędkościomierz w mph – przelicz na km/h.

items.title: Sporty motorowe

items.title: Meteorologia

items.title: Complete privacy

contentBlocks.title: How does km/h to mph conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
Since 1 mile = 1.60934 km, 1 km/h = 1/1.60934 = 0.621371 mph.

To convert km/h to mph, multiply by 0.621371. To convert mph to km/h, multiply by 1.60934.

Quick mental math: multiply km/h by 0.6 for a rough estimate, or divide by 1.6.

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• City speed: 50 km/h = 31 mph. Residential: 30 km/h = 19 mph.
  • Highway: 100 km/h = 62 mph, 120 km/h = 75 mph, 130 km/h = 81 mph.
  • Speed of sound: 1,235 km/h = 767 mph (at sea level, 20°C).
  • F1 top speed: ~370 km/h = 230 mph.

items.question: What is the US highway speed limit in km/h?
items.answer: US highway limits are typically 65–75 mph = 105–121 km/h.

items.question: Quick way to convert?
items.answer: Multiply km/h by 0.6 or divide by 1.6. Example: 120 km/h × 0.6 = 72 mph (exact: 74.6 mph).

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
